title: Approvals
description: Review and sign off campaigns submitted for approval.
emptyDescription: Campaigns submitted by advertisers will appear here.
readOnlyNotice: Read-only view. Your role can't take review actions on this campaign.
actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
requestChangesDescription: Tell the advertiser what needs to change. They'll revise and re-submit this asset.
signOffHint: Approve every asset first, then sign-off records the approval and unlocks distribution.
rejectDescription: This ends the campaign. A rejected campaign can't be resubmitted. Tell the advertiser why.
rejectReasonPlaceholder: Why are you rejecting this campaign?
rejectReasonTooShort: Add at least 100 characters explaining the rejection.
distributeHint: The campaign is approved. Schedule when it runs, or reopen an asset to send it back.
scheduleDescription: Set when this approved campaign runs. Nothing publishes automatically; these dates record the planned window.
scheduleDateRequired: Pick a start date and time.
endBeforeStart: The end can't be before the start.
goLiveHint: Mark the campaign live when it starts running.
scheduledForHint: Scheduled for {{date}}. Mark it live when it starts running.
markLiveDescription: Confirm this campaign is now running.
liveHint: Mark it complete once the run ends.
markCompleteDescription: Confirm this campaign's run has ended.
reopenDescription: Send approved assets back to the advertiser for changes. The campaign returns to in-progress; untouched assets keep their approval.
reopenSelectAtLeastOne: Pick at least one asset to reopen.
reopenReasonRequired: Add a short note for the advertiser.
footerWaitingHint: The advertiser is still preparing this campaign. You'll be able to review once it's submitted.
footerClosedHint: There are no further review actions for this campaign.
